name: lighthouse-performance
description: Add local Lighthouse performance reports and a configurable performance budget.
docs: Document LIGHTHOUSE_URL for the target app.
Document LIGHTHOUSE_SERVER_COMMAND when the script should start the app.
verify: LIGHTHOUSE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 LIGHTHOUSE_SERVER_COMMAND="npm run dev" npm run lighthouse
notes: Adapt the URL and server command before running.
Do not audit authenticated or secret-backed pages unless the target repo explicitly documents that setup.
